text: I feel a sense of anticipation as I walk through this space. The sterile, modern architecture evokes both curiosity and a mild disquiet—it’s almost too clean, too orderly. Yet, as I turn the corner and am greeted by the R+D display, curiosity takes the upper hand. The colorful exhibit promises innovation and insight. I feel like an explorer on the threshold of discovery, my mind alert and eager to find meaning in the patterns and connections presented here. There is something invigorating about standing within a place dedicated to knowledge and possibility.
